author: brosequist
title: ComfyUI Pipeline Memory Barrier
description: Inserts an explicit GPU cache flush (soft_empty_cache + gc.collect + torch.cuda.empty_cache) between pipeline stages. Prevents OOM kills in multi-stage workflows such as WanVideo two-pass I2V. Works on any wire type — LATENT, MODEL, IMAGE, etc. Logs GPU and RAM usage before and after flush.
